item.title: Ricky Sandler shuttering Eminence Capital after 27-year run
item.description: His fund has posted disappointing returns and the high costs of retaining talent and building out necessary infrastructure made continuing the firm to...

item.title: Exclusive: Michael Boes talks being named the first-ever chief MAHA officer. ‘Nothing’s been off the table’
item.description: Michael Boes is a former HHS adviser who worked under Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and was one of the key architects who turned the food pyramid upside down.

item.title: Data centers are finding a surprising way to deploy batteries
item.description: As AI strains the grid, data center operators are pairing batteries with natural gas generators to keep power flowing, turning a key clean-energy tech...

item.title: ‘This is a ‘come to Jesus moment’: Ford CEO says American carmakers are battling a perfect storm
item.description: If Ford "doesn't put its chips on the right number," it may not survive, said Farley.

item.title: Meta executive says he gets stressed only five times a year and that it’s actually ‘a useful signal’
item.description: Meta chief technology officer Andrew Bosworth says being busy with important matters on the table is his stress “trigger”: He calms down with exercise...
